Durable Waterproof Shell: Outer layer made from high-quality nylon — water-repellent, wind-resistant, and tough enough for outdoor use. Mummy Design for Warmth: Streamlined mummy shape with adjustable drawstring hood effectively locks in heat and blocks out cold air. Versatile Outdoor Use: Perfect for backpacking, camping, Boy Scouts, or mountain hiking — doubles as a cozy camping quilt when unzipped. Easy to Pack & Clean: Smooth zip closure and compression sack make packing fast and convenient; easy to clean for long-term use.

description: FEATURES Balance of water resistance and air permeability The fabric of cotton canvas series canopy is treated with water repellent coating. Cotton is designed to provide the best balance between water resistance and air permeability. Cotton canvas fabric is not "waterproof" like plastic or synthetic materials. Cotton canvas is a kind of natural material It will mildew and damage when it is stored wet. If you store a cotton canopy after a shower or early morning dew condensation, set up the canopy immediately after you go home and let it dry completely before long-term storage. Please pay attention to cleaning (including tent pole) during storage Before long-term storage, please clean the dirt and other natural follow-up objects, and keep other accessories such as poles and ground nails clean. The best way to clean the canopy is to clean it with water and a soft brush and then dry it. Do not use alkaline or irritant washing products to avoid damaging the water repellent coating of the canopy. description: Naturehike Winter Sleeping Bag 850FP Goose Down - Ultralight & All-Season Comfort Experience unparalleled warmth and comfort with Naturehike's J-series gaiter bags, designed to endure harsh winter conditions down to -30 degrees Celsius. Available in models JA700, JA1000, and JA1300, these sleeping bags feature premium 850FP goose down fill, ensuring optimal insulation and lightweight performance. Ethical Down Standard (RDS) Certified Our commitment to ethical practices is reinforced by our adherence to the Responsible Down Standard (RDS). This international certification guarantees that our down comes from ducks and geese not subjected to live island harvesting or force-feeding. Each batch undergoes traceability audits to ensure humane treatment throughout the supply chain. Premium Construction for Ultimate Durability Crafted with a robust 5D nylon outer layer, these sleeping bags are waterproof and resistant to wear and tear. The inner liner and muffler are made of high-quality 5D bonjie fabric, offering excellent moisture absorption, breathability, and smoothness. The sponge fabric adds extra warmth, lightness, and durability while maintaining quick-drying properties and superior elasticity. It's designed to comfortably seat two, making it the perfect choice for couples or friends who enjoy camping, beach trips, or relaxing in their backyard. Its robust frame of aluminum alloy and iron ensures durability and a high load-bearing capacity, making it a reliable addition to your outdoor gear. Strong Frame Composition : Constructed from a blend of aluminum alloy and iron, enhancing its durability and load-bearing capabilities. Elevated Load-bearing : Can support approximately 350 lbs, despite weighing only 12.8 lbs. Versatile Use : Ideal for various settings, including home, outdoor gatherings, and camping trips. Elegant Wood Grain Armrests : Adds a touch of sophistication and comfort to the seating experience.

description: Brave the extreme cold with the XR1500 Snowmelt Down Sleeping Bag , designed for professional-grade warmth and comfort in temperatures as low as -35°C . This high-performance sleeping bag combines advanced insulation technology with durable, water-resistant materials to keep you warm, dry, and comfortable in the harshest winter conditions. Whether you're camping in snowy mountains or exploring icy terrains, the XR1500 ensures superior heat retention and ultimate coziness. Key Features: Ultra-Warmth Design : Features a 90% duck down filling with 650FP and hollow cotton insulation for exceptional heat retention, even in extreme cold. Water-Resistant Fabric : The 30D nylon outer shell and 70D nylon bottom are treated with a water-repellent coating to protect against moisture and dampness. Comfortable & Breathable : The 300T polyester lining ensures softness and breathability, while the 3D foot box provides extra space and warmth for your feet. Dual-Layer Insulation : Unique combination filling technology prevents heat loss from the bottom, with hollow cotton (160GSM x 3) offering additional warmth, moisture resistance, and breathability. Durable & Portable : Despite its robust construction, the sleeping bag is designed for easy packing, with a compact storage size of 35x50cm and a weight of approximately 3800g . Built with waterproof and breathable materials, it helps keep you warm, dry, and comfortable during camping, hiking, and travel adventures. Waterproof & Breathable Fabric Construction Made with durable waterproof outer fabric and breathable inner lining, helping keep moisture out while maintaining comfort during use. Lightweight & Portable for Easy Carrying Designed to be compact and travel-friendly, making it convenient to pack, carry, and store during camping, hiking, and travel. description: Enjoy stability and comfort wherever you go with the Naturehike Ultralight Camping Chair. Made from aircraft-grade aluminum and breathable 600D Oxford fabric, this compact chair is easy to set up and built for durability. With anti-sagging feet and a carry bag included, it's a dependable companion for all your outdoor adventures—from camping to beach days and everything in between. Key Features: Ultralight & Strong – Aircraft-grade aluminum frame weighs only 1.28 kg yet supports up to 150 kg Durable & Breathable – 600D Oxford fabric with side mesh panels offers comfort and ventilation Quick Setup – Simple 2-step assembly lets you relax instantly at campfires, festivals, or events Stable Foot Design – Anti-sagging feet prevent sinking into sand or soft ground Portable & Versatile – Comes with a storage bag, ideal for hiking, fishing, BBQs, or travel
